scripts.databases:generate: bun prisma generate --schema=packages/app-db/prisma/schema.prisma && bun prisma generate --schema=packages/ims-db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.databases:push: bun --schema=packages/app-db/prisma/schema.prisma prisma db push && bun prisma db push --schema=packages/ims-db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.databases:pull: bun --schema=packages/app-db/prisma/schema.prisma prisma db pull && bun prisma db pull --schema=packages/ims-db/prisma/schema.prisma
